    feat(federation): hub GraphQL federationNodes/federatedBeads/Runs/Projects + routing metadata [ddx-586d9431]
    
    Adds federated query surface on the hub that fans out to registered spokes
    via the B14.6a fan-out client. Each row carries node_id, project_id,
    project_url, write_capability, and status so the UI can deep-link back to
    the originating spoke. Local query types are unchanged — federated queries
    ship in parallel per the locked parallel-ship decision.
    
    - schema: FederationNode, FederatedBead, FederatedRun, FederatedProject and
      four Query.federation* fields, regenerated via gqlgen.
    - resolver_federation.go: implements all four queries against a
      FederationProvider interface so tests can substitute mock spokes; the
      synthetic @identity capability is filtered out of the surface;
      writeCapability is derived from the spoke's advertised "write" capability.
    - resolver_federation_test.go: integration tests against two mock spoke
      servers verify shape (all four queries), partial-result rendering when one
      spoke is offline, and version-skew rendering (skewed spoke is visible in
      federationNodes but excluded from data fan-out).

# B14.7 — Frontend /federation route + node-picker + scope toggle + status badges

## Houdini codegen (AC: "Houdini types regenerated and committed")

The bead description references Houdini, but the SvelteKit frontend in this
repo does **not** use Houdini. The dependency is absent from
`cli/internal/server/frontend/package.json`, there is no `houdini.config.js`,
and no `bun run houdini:generate` script exists. Queries are written as
inline `gql` template literals consumed via `graphql-request` (see
`src/lib/gql/client.ts`). The Houdini AC item is therefore N/A; in its place,
each new query is added as a typed GraphQL document next to the route that
uses it, mirroring the existing pattern in `src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/runs/+page.ts`
and `src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/beads/+page.ts`.

## AC mapping

| AC item | Evidence |
|---|---|
| `/federation` renders registered nodes with status badges | `src/routes/federation/+page.{ts,svelte}` — table of FederationNode rows; `data-testid="federation-status-badge"` |
| Node-picker shows spokes | `src/lib/components/NodePicker.svelte` (mounted in `NavShell.svelte`); queries `federationNodes` |
| `?scope=federation` toggles combined views to federated* queries | `src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/beads/+page.ts` and `runs/+page.ts` switch on `url.searchParams.get('scope')`; UI exposes `data-testid="scope-toggle"` |
| Per-row node badges visible | `data-testid="row-node-badge"` on each row in beads + runs federation tables |
| Stale/offline/degraded distinct visual states | `src/lib/federationStatus.ts` maps each spoke status to a different `badge-status-*` class; offline rows additionally render with `opacity-60` on the federation overview |
| Direct spoke URL link on each /federation row | `data-testid="federation-spoke-link"` anchors `target="_blank"` to `node.url` |
| Houdini types regenerated and committed | N/A — project does not use Houdini (see note above) |

base rev with my changes stashed; unrelated to this bead).

Committed. Implementation summary:

- **`/federation`** route (`+page.{ts,svelte}`) lists `federationNodes` with per-node status badges (active/stale/offline/degraded/registered each mapped to a distinct `badge-status-*` class), version-skew badge, and a direct spoke link (`target="_blank"`).
- **`NodePicker`** component mounted in `NavShell` queries `federationNodes` and lets users jump to any spoke; shows current node's federation status badge.
- **Federation nav link** added to sidebar.
- **`/nodes/[nodeId]/beads`** and **`/nodes/[nodeId]/runs`** read `?scope=federation` and dispatch to `federatedBeads` / `federatedRuns` instead of the local queries; UI gains a `scope: local/federation` toggle chip, a per-row node badge column (status-colored), and a row-level "spoke ↗" deep-link.
- **`federationStatus.ts`** centralizes the status→badge mapping plus a version-skew heuristic.
- **GraphQL preview fallbacks** added in `client.ts` so static preview doesn't 404.
- **Houdini codegen N/A** — project uses `graphql-request` with inline `gql` literals; documented in `.ddx/executions/20260502T181621-7a485593/notes.md`.
- `svelte-check`: 0 errors. Unit tests: only one pre-existing failure (`D3Graph.contrast.spec.ts`, verified failing on base rev).
